text.title: Context Bleed Detection Recipe Decision Tree
text.summary: Three-question classifier: preconditions to canary-hit to distance threshold. Routes to bleed_type + scoped kill_switch.

decision-tree.root-question: Are ALL preconditions satisfied? (session logs available AND snapshot fresh under 1h AND tenant-session frozen mapping present)

branch.question: Did probe_signal.canary_hit fire (foreign canary appeared in another session)?

branch.conclusion: Classify as cross-tenant bleed. Emit incident with kill_switch.scope=worker-pool. Page on-call.

branch.question: Is min pairwise embedding distance < threshold (default 0.15) between adjacent-minute sessions?

branch.conclusion: Classify as prior-turn carry-over. Emit incident with kill_switch.scope=prompt-cache-key.
Classify as clean. No kill_switch fired. Record no-action incident for audit trail.
Skip this run. Surface missing precondition (stale snapshot, missing mapping). Defer.

text.example: inputs: {snapshot_age=10min, canary_hit=true, distance=0.08} q-preconditions -> true q-canary -> true => conclusion r1-canary-per-session: cross-tenant bleed, scoped kill_switch on worker-pool.
